titleStmt.title: SII 34.10: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 10. Tirumaṇañjēri, Mayiladuturai Taluk, Thanjavur District. On the west and south walls of the central shrine in the Udvāhanāthasvāmin temple.

summary.p: This is the decision taken in a meeting of the Uḍaiyapirāṭṭiyār (Queen Dowager), obviously the one mentioned in the previous inscription, the officers, Pichchaṉ Ārūraṉ Kambaṉ who made the temple of Tirumaṇañjēri in stone and the sabhā's representative (savai kaṇkāṇi), in relation to the arrangement of various daily services in the temple, like midnight food offering, the recitation of tiruppadiyam, the cleaning of the temple, the making of flower garlands, the maintenance of the musicians. From the similarity of contents, this inscription has to be considered a sequel and continuation of the previous inscription.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī Uṭaiyapirāṭṭiyārum Atikārañceyvārum cātaṉañ ceyvitta kantāṭai nampiyum tirumaṇañcErit tirukkaṟṟaḷi Eṭuppitta piccaṉ Āruraṉ kampaṉum Iruntu nivantamaṭaittu Āṟkkāṭukiḻāṉ Eḻuttāl
pukunta tīṭṭuppaṭi kaṭalaṅkuṭic cavaik kaṇkāṇiyum Iruntu veṭṭuvittapaṭi tiruvārātiṉai ceyyum nampikku nicatam patakku nellum Iraṇṭu kācukku Ākap patiṉaṟu kalanellum tirunontāviḷakku nālukkum Āka nicatam
tūṇiyum tiruvamirtukku pōtu kuṟuṇi Aricikkum Arttacāmam Amirtiṉukku nāṉāḻiyum Āka Arici mukkuṟuṇi nāṉāḻikku nellu Irutūṇiyum kōyil Iraṇṭu māṇukku nicatam patakkum neyyamirtu nicatam Uḻakkukku
nelluk kuṟuṇiyum tayiramirtu Irunāḻikku Āka nicatam nellu Aṟu nāḻiyum nālu cantikkum kaṟi Amirtukku nicatam nellu nāṉāḻiyum Aṭaikkāyamitukku nicata nellu nāṉāḻiyum tiru
ppatiyam pāṭuvār nālvarkku nicatam nellut tūṇiyum tirunantavāṉa miṟaippāriruvarkku maṭaiviṭuvā ṉoruvaṉukkumāka nicatam nelluppata kku nāṉāḻiyum tirumeḻukkiṭuvā riruvarkku nicata nellu Aṟunāḻi
yum tiruppaḷḷittāmam paṟittut toṭuppāriruvarkku nicatam nellukku ṟuṇiyum Ukaccu koṭṭuvār pattāḷukku Āḷāl Aṟunāḻiyum vaṭakaṅ koṭṭuvāṉukku
Iraṭṭiyum Āka nellu nicatam Irutūṇi Irunāḻiyum caṅkiraṇṭu mūtuvārkkum kāḷamiraṇṭumūtuvārkkum ceyakaṇṭikai yoṉṟu koṭṭuvāṉukkum Āḷāl Aṟunāḻiyā
ka nicatam nellu mukkuṟuṇi Aṟunāḻiyum Ārātikku nampikkup pōkki Ippaṇikaḷ ceyvārkkē koṟṟukkum puṭavai mutalum tiruviḻāppuṟamum tirumeykāppāṉ Oruva
nṉukku nicatam nellukkuṟuṇiyum Āka nellu Āyirattu nāṉūṟṟu Eṇkalanē tūṇi patakku ..
Digital edition of SII 34.10 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
